raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-reflective acknowledgment of a cognitive distinction",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "automatic thoughts exist and can be observed",
    "evidence about what is true exists independently",
    "automatic thoughts are capable of diverging from that evidence",
    "the speaker has noticed or can notice this divergence"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; distinguishes subjective mental events from objective evidence without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "recognition of the distinction enables more accurate evaluation of thoughts and reduces distortion in a therapeutic or self-regulatory context",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the distinction is taken to imply all automatic thoughts are false or that subjective experience has no epistemic value"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: self-reflective acknowledgment of a cognitive distinction
implicit_claims: automatic thoughts exist and can be observed
evidence about what is true exists independently
automatic thoughts are capable of diverging from that evidence

parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: the distinction is taken to imply all automatic thoughts are false or that subjective experience has no epistemic value
